dvids.title: Carrier Air Wing (CVW) 8 Returns Following 11-Month Deployment
dvids.desc: VIRGINIA BEACH, Va. (May 11, 2026) Sailors assigned to Carrier Air Wing (CVW) 8 return to Naval Air Station Oceana following a historic 11-month deployment to the U.S. 2nd, 4th, 5th and 6th Fleets as part of the Gerald R. Ford Carrier Strike Group. CVW-8 logged more than 5,500 flight hours in suppor

dvids.title: New Man on Deck:  First 60 Days as Able Seaman
dvids.desc: Norfolk, Va. (May 11, 2026) - Sixty days into his new role as Able Seaman (AB) on USS Mount Whitney (LCC 20), Military Sealift Command (MSC) Civil Service Mariner (CIVMAR) Jimmie Moore Jr. provides an update, detailing his first two months, his passion for growing as a mariner, and some insights for
